name: AviChina Industry & Technology Company Limited
summary: AviChina Industry & Technology Company Limited engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of civil aviation products and related engineering services. The company operates through three segments: Aviation Entire Aircraft Business, Aviation Ancillary System and Related Business, and Aviation Engineering Services Business. It is involved in the development, manufacture, sale, and upgradation of defense and civil aviation products, such as helicopters, trainer and general-purpose aircrafts, and regional jets; and manufacture and sale of aviation ancillary system products, including connectors, avionics products, and its accessories. The company also offers aviation, civil, and industrial construction marketing and project contracting services. In addition, the company engages in finance and investment, information consulting, and training and house rental activities. Further, it offers aviation engineering services, such as planning, design, consultation, construction, and operation, as well as develops, manufactures, remodels, and sells unmanned aerial vehicle products. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. AviChina Industry & Technology Company Limited is a subsidiary of Aviation Industry Corporation of China, Ltd.
